label: Ritual outcome comp (pawn age)
description: Scores quality based on the biological age of the pawn in the specified role, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve evaluated at the pawn age.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the pawn biological age in years (X) to quality offset (Y).

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: Ritual role ID string identifying which pawn's age to evaluate.
